chapter_title.ar: بَابُ فَضْلِ الْحَجِّ وَ الْعُمْرَةِ وَ ثَوَابِهِمَا
chapter_title.en: Chapter 28 – Merits of the Hajj and the Umra, and their Rewards

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مرسل - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (17/126)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مرسل - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (17/126)
text: الْحَاجُّ لَا يَزَالُ عَلَيْهِ نُورُ الْحَجِّ مَا لَمْ يُلِمَّ بِذَنْبٍ .

en.hubeali: Ahmad Bin Abu Muhammad Al Hajjal, from Dawood Bin Abu Yazeed, from the one who mentioned it,
(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘The pilgrim is such that the Light of the Hajj does not cease to be upon him for as long as he does not sin’.
en.sarwar: 11. Ahmad has narrated from abu Muhammad al-Hajjal, from Dawud ibn abu Yazid from those whom he has mentioned who has said the foiiowing: “Abu ‘ Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said that a pilgrim continues to live with the light of al-Hajj until he commits sins again and again.’”
